option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <selector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:state_selected="true"> <shape android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#FF0000" /> <!-- Selected dot color, customize as needed --> <size android:width="8dp" android:height="8dp" /> </shape> </item> <item> <shape android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#CCCCCC" /> <!-- Unselected dot color, customize as needed --> <size android:width="8dp" android:height="8dp" /> </shape> </item> </selector>
